feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: From Gotham with Love
entry.summary:
Author: anxiousdepressedintrovert

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 70,164Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 119

Summary: Martha and Thomas Wayne are Gotham’s golden couple—wealthy, admired, and untouchable. Their daughter, Beatrice, is the heart of their legacy. But one night shatters everything. The Waynes are murdered in cold blood, and young Beatrice vanishes without a trace. Two years later, she returns. Alive—but not the same. Now, Gotham must face the mystery of the girl who came back... and the shadows that followed her home.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: An Unhealthy Obssession
entry.summary:
Author: Su1c1d4l_4l3x4nd3r

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,936Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 261

Summary: "All that we see or seem is but a dream within a dream.” You move back to Gotham after failing to make it in Metropolis and accidentally stumble onto a murder scene laced with Scarecrow’s fear gas. Shaken and paranoid from the exposure, you run right into Red Robin on patrol. Instead of being seen as a victim, your behavior makes you look guilty. Tim’s instincts kick in, and he convinces himself you’re hiding something. From there, he starts watching, digging, and following — obsessed with proving a guilt that isn’t really there. or Tim Drake being a fucking creep, like he is programmed to be. Tim Drake x Male reader.

entry.title: A Touch of Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Fyoex

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,568Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 7

Summary: To prepare for a scenario where Superboy loses his powers mid-battle, Nightwing volunteers to help train them using Blue Kryptonite. But concern mounts when Jon has an abnormally strong reaction to it. And when he’s later kept in the dark about the young Kent’s condition, Dick Grayson finds himself becoming a tad unhinged. – Even before his Kryptonian heritage officially set in, Jonathan Kent had never once gotten sick, not even with the common cold. So he didn’t quite understand the implications behind a simple bruise. It’s alright, though. For the people he loves the most, he will persevere.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 109,878Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 57

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore.   i don't own any of the characters and i don't give permission for AI to use my work

entry.title: Dead Reckoning Part Two
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 186,720Chapters: 11/12Kudos: 11

Summary: Aven is living on borrowed time, his body harboring something intelligent, dangerous, and very much awake. As powerful corporations circle and a desperate mission pushes him deep into enemy territory, survival demands disguises, secrets, and impossible trust. Love offers brief sanctuary, even as it makes everything more fragile. Hunted, exposed, and running out of room to run, Aven must face the truth:staying alive may cost more than dying ever would...

entry.title: A Little Sunshine
entry.summary:
Author: LuminescentWoollyBear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,933Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 39

Summary: An alien appears in Metropolis and Bruce doesn't know what to do about it. Even more concerning, Bruce breaks his promise to himself to avoid unnecessary attachments and starts developing feelings for his new friend, Clark. But he just can't help gravitating towards the earnest kindness and protective warmth of the other. If he isn't careful, Bruce might even start trusting him. ~~~ None of them are prominent, but this fic does include some non-superbat ships to various degrees, including: Bruce/Other, Bruce/Selina Kyle

entry.title: congratulations, you adopted a spider!
entry.summary:
Author: maraudersmqry

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 200,506Chapters: 31/31Kudos: 4,791

Summary: Peter was meant to be forgotten, he didn’t think that meant being dropped in Gotham. Or in his eight-year-old body, in the least. Or with vigilantes trying to adopt him!IN WHICH, Dr. Strange gave Peter one last chance at a life, instead of being emo around the faces who no longer recognized him.

entry.title: And I'll Do It Over Again (Hopefully Better This Time)
entry.summary:
Author: god_i_love_fanfics

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,629Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 539

Summary: If you told one Damian Wayne he’d find a small, pit-touched child shivering under an overpass in a pool of what appeared to be Lazarus water tainted only by rainwater and blood, he’d probably question your sanity. Of course, he’d keep what you’d said in mind, but ultimately regard the notion as the nonsensical babbling of an unstable fool. After all, people, especially children, don’t just bleed Pit waters. But that’s exactly what he’s looking at, isn’t it?

entry.title: Do I Wanna Know?
entry.summary:
Author: Deluv_011

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 83,728Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 532

Summary: Damian Wayne and Conner Kent form an unexpected couple. However, few knew that behind that façade, each of them had their heart burning for someone else. Thus, Damian and Conner cling to each other as a distorted reflection of what they truly long for. Damian yearns for Jon Kent. Conner pines for Tim Drake. And the deeper they fall into that strange relationship, the more they begin to notice certain glances among their teammates… glances that reveal far more than mere friendship.

entry.title: The Detective’s Greatest Blindspot
entry.summary:
Author: Tigerphoenix

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,328Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 72

Summary: While he just wants Superman to stay on his side of the bay, Bruce encounters reporter Clark Kent at a gala, who calls Bruce out on his "Brucie" act. What starts as a tense "what are you hiding?" case turns into a genuine connection, where Bruce is so convinced that Clark Kent and the alien savior of Metropolis could never be the same person, he misses Clark's biggest secret. Then disaster strikes. In a Superman fight, the Daily Planet is destroyed, and witnesses say Clark was inside. Clark is dead—Superman's negligence killed him—and it has turned the Bat into a hunter, looking for a way to make the god pay for killing the best man he had ever known.

entry.title: united states v. alexander luthor
entry.summary:
Author: snapdragonsuplex

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,523Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 130

Summary: “Alright, people, look alive, time for assignments.” Clark turns in his chair as Perry starts doling out assignments, only half-paying attention until his name is called. “Kent, you’ve got the Luthor trial.” Clark blinks, then feels all of the blood drain out of his face. -------------- Nearly a year after the events that saw Metropolis and the entire world almost torn in two, the federal trial of Lex Luthor begins. Clark is assigned to cover the trial.

entry.title: Parent Trap
entry.summary:
Author: i8thecookie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,380Chapters: 5/10Kudos: 266

Summary: When Dick Grayson forces Clark to pretend to be his parent for a meeting with his headmaster, Clark expects an awkward conversation and maybe a lecture from Bruce afterward. He does not expect Gotham’s tabloids to decide he and Bruce Wayne are secretly together. But after one too many headlines about Bruce Wayne’s “mysterious co-parent,” pretending to date starts seeming like the easiest solution. That would probably be less of a problem if Clark wasn’t already half in love with him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Puzzles and Platonia
entry.summary:
Author: StarwriterOdeya

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,226Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Lex Luthor received a sentient email and followed the ritual to be left alone. Clark Kent was called by Lepon naapurusto to meet the Honoured Spirit. He hadn't heard of the planet it belonged to because it had been fictional. He greeted Faith Lawson, Ascended name Odeya. Their challenges were easily conquered, including the one Faith thought would be the most troublesome. The Coarse-Born reverted to Metropolites and went their ways. Clark returned to work and sent The Flash, Barry Allen, to keep Faith company and bring lunch. Flash and Superman thought that Faith should stay, given her knowledge and abilities, and Flash helped Faith choose her hero name, Aileni. He brought her to Gotham, having seen her phone case and wallet, and they found a great option in the listings Batman provided, Atrium Residencies. Faith had powerful Forms and Modes thanks to her Role in Thalassic Space and the Ever-Light Cloth, but had physical disabilities because of her dwarfism and was mortal. She could see Hidden Object Scenes and puzzles, and had good eyesight, resilience, and charm. But she wrote fantasy-horror, had a few phobias, and randomly faced Master difficulty logic puzzles to make things "fair". Nothing could go wrong!

entry.title: Man of Steel, Heart of Glass
entry.summary:
Author: glitter_gutz

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,276Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 76

Summary: Bruce hates how Clark treats him like a petulant child, but he craves the adrenaline of being with the city's golden boy. Their intimacy is a battlefield. And it's marked by biting, scratching, and grip so tight it bruises. Proud marks that prove they were the ones to break the other’s composure. It’s a toxic, addictive cycle where the only time they feel truly close is when they are tearing each other apart and putting themselves back together.

entry.title: EFFORTS TO REVERSE THE FLOODING OF GOTHAM / Myotis septentrionalis; behaviors and observations
entry.summary:
Author: Save_Feza

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,676Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 23

Summary: In the aftermath of Lex Luthor’s attacks, Clark has been attempting to find the good in all the distress. Luckily, down the road in Gotham, the restoration efforts after similar disasters may inspire the people of Metropolis to look to the skies with hope and ambition again. The hard part is that his source, one Bruce Wayne, isn’t the sociable type. Good thing Superman has the means to befriend Gotham's protector, Batman!Bruce Wayne is struggling to find his place in the reconstruction of Gotham. It doesn't help that in the confusing swirl of spearheading a new construction company, stopping a new rampant drug plaguing the streets, and potentially adopting a child, an overly friendly reporter will not leave him alone. Not to mention the sudden appearance of Superman.–This probably sucks but at least I'm not using ai :)Shoutout to my friends who gave me the go ahead to start publishing! UPDATES WILL BE SLOW I AM STARTING YEAR 3 OF COLLEGE
